headline: Is CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) Cheap On Its Schwarz Digits Partnership And Pullback?
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) has drawn fresh attention after expanding its partnership with Schwarz Digits to bring the Falcon cybersecurity platform to European enterprises on STACKIT, a sovereign cloud operated within the European Union. See our latest analysis for CrowdStrike Holdings. The latest Schwarz Digits agreement and recent product developments come after a sharp pullback, with CrowdStrike Holdings’ share price down 9.3% over the past week but still posting a 68.6% year to date...
